title: Just A Sculk Vial
description: Simply adds a Skulk Vial in which you can store and retrieve experience.
body:
**Just A Sculk Vial** is a lightweight, standalone mod that adds a single item: the _Sculk Vial_. This vial lets you store and reclaim your experience points (XP) at will, offering safety, strategy, and control over your progression. Perfect for adventurers who want to secure their XP before danger, or simply transfer it between players.

 

## **Features**

*   Adds the **Sculk Vial**, an item that can store up to 1395 XP (equivalent to level 30).
*   **Hold Shift + Right Click** to store your current experience into the vial.
*   **Right Click** to instantly retrieve all stored experience.
*   The vial’s **texture changes dynamically** based on the amount of XP it contains.
*   Tooltip displays current XP stored, with extra usage hints when F3 + H is enabled.
*   Keybinds displayed in tooltips automatically adapt to each player’s control settings.
*   Designed for **survival gameplay**. No GUI, no dependencies, no extra clutter.

## **Recipe**

![](https://i.imgur.com/8zLCIWO.png)

**![*Storing XP.*](https://i.imgur.com/9xR3xEB.gif)** _Storing XP._

 

**![](https://i.imgur.com/RkIVP55.gif)** _Receiving XP._

 

## **Credits**

*   **JetStarfish** – Original design and mechanics of the _Sculk Vial_ from the [Jet's Better Exploration](https://modrinth.com/mod/jbe) mod.
*   **JustJabka** – Visual assets from the [Sculk Vial](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sculk-vial) Data Pack page.
